description: Create a validation rule in DHIS2 named 'Penta1 >= Penta3' to ensure data logic for immunization: 'Penta 1 doses given' must be greater than or equal to 'Penta 3 doses given'. Add this rule to a validation rule group named 'Immunization Quality Checks'. Run a validation analysis for the 'Bo' district for the year '2023' and save the results (list of violations or 'no violations found') to /home/ga/Desktop/validation_results.txt. Login credentials: admin / district.
